title: WigWag Art & Music Fest
description: A vibrant art and music festival featuring local artists, live music, food vendors, and family-friendly activities. Great atmosphere for couples who love art and outdoor vibes.

title: Comedy & Candles Rooftop Night — Love In The Dark
location: REVERB Downtown Atlanta, 89 Centennial Olympic Park Dr NW, Atlanta, GA 30313
description: Candlelit rooftop comedy show with a candle making class at 7PM followed by stand-up at 9PM, plus a live dating game show. Stunning city views, cocktails, and guaranteed laughs — perfect for couples who want a fun, memorable night out.

title: Lila Iké — The Masquerade
location: The Loft at The Masquerade, 1374 West Peachtree St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Jamaican reggae star Lila Iké brings her soulful, captivating voice to Atlanta. Intimate venue with The Loft's great sound — ideal for couples who love reggae, island vibes, and live music.

title: Xscape: The Mother's Day Love Affair
location: Fox Theatre, 660 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
description: R&B legends XSCAPE return home to Atlanta for one night only, joined by K. Michelle and Donell Jones. Celebrate Mother's Day with the queens of R&B at the gorgeous, iconic Fox Theatre — a truly unforgettable date night.

title: Comedy Double Header — Teju Babyface & Sheyeto Productions
location: 3100 Avalon Ridge Pl NW, Peachtree Corners, GA
description: Two comedians, double the laughs. Hosted by Teju Babyface Organization with Sheyeto Productions — a well-curated comedy night perfect for couples who want a fun, laid-back evening with great food and non-stop laughter.

title: AfroVibez 2026 — 5th Annual Africa Day Celebration
location: MOWA, 1705 Commerce Dr NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
description: Atlanta's premier Afrobeat and African heritage celebration. Dress code is Red, Yellow/Gold, or Green — representing Pan-African pride. Great live performances, food, vendors, and a vibrant community vibe perfect for couples who love African culture and music.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival — Memorial Day Weekend
description: One of the largest FREE jazz festivals in the country, featuring headliners like The Roots, Esperanza Spalding, Kamasi Washington, and PJ Morton across three days. Bring a blanket, grab food from vendors, and enjoy world-class jazz under the open sky — perfect for a romantic picnic-style date.

title: Date Night All White — Live Sax & Romantic Dinner
location: 675 Evans St SW, Atlanta, GA 30310 (Historic Post Office)
description: Atlanta's No. 1 couples event returns! Elegant all-white dress code affair with live saxophonist Trey Daniels, DJ Ron Allen, candlelit dinner for two by Chef Yvette, ultra-premium cocktails, 360 photo booth, and caricature artists. A luxurious, sensual night built for couples who want to truly connect and celebrate their relationship.
